_comment: Replace the absolute paths with your own. These hooks run when a Claude Code session ends in the vault: back the vault up to a PRIVATE git remote, then write a session log. Keep the scripts outside the vault (e.g. ~/scripts) so Full Disk Access survives macOS updates. Both scripts ship as .template files in /scripts — copy them out, edit the paths, and chmod +x.

hooks.statusMessage: Backing up vault to private git remote
